# Hash-pinned deps for .github/workflows/verify-mask.yml (Scorecard Pinned-Dependencies, #70).
# Slim on purpose: verify_mask.py flood-fills the COMMITTED mask — no rebuild, no geo stack.
# Regenerate: pip-compile --generate-hashes --strip-extras --no-annotate \
#   --output-file=.github/workflows/verify-mask-requirements.txt <(printf "numpy==X\nscipy==Y\n")
# (hashes below cover ALL published wheels+sdist per version, so any runner arch resolves)
